text: Apple faces significant macro and geopolitical risks, particularly concerning export controls and currency fluctuations. According to the balance sheet (chunk_id_35dda38d-318e-4e7b-aab2-fdecab9788b8), Apple has substantial international operations, with a large portion of its revenue coming from outside the U.S. Any tightening of export controls could severely impact its supply chain and sales. Additionally, currency exchange rate volatility poses a risk to the company's profitability, especially given its reliance on foreign markets (chunk_id_b514afc2-5e79-48b8-be76-213c12fd2bfb).
